title: scutellaria alpina subsp. jabalambrensis
intro: Scutellaria alpina subsp. jabalambrensis is a subspecies of alpine skullcap, a flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae, native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been found to exhibit various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. These benefits may include reducing inflammation, improving cognitive function, and providing antimicrobial properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness. In herbal medicine, Scutellaria alpina subsp. jabalambrensis is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is traditionally used to support mental health and alleviate symptoms associated with anxiety and insomnia.
